title: History and Science Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with History or Social Studies Composite Endorsement and Science Core (6-8) EndorsementThe salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
